description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

Hanno City is selling 6 parcels of city-owned land through general competitive bidding.

【Properties for sale】
6 parcels in Yamate-cho: 3 agricultural plots (total area 242.23 sq m) and 3 residential plots (total area 797.75 sq m)

【Minimum sale price】
68,000,000 yen for all 6 parcels combined

【Bid security (deposit)】
10,200,000 yen

【Zoning】
First-class residential district

【Bidding application period】
May 22, 2026 (Reiwa 8) – June 5, 2026 (Friday)
9:00 a.m. – 4:30 p.m.

【Bidding date and time】
June 19, 2026 (Friday), 2:00 p.m.

【Bidding venue】
Hanno City Hall Main Building, 2nd Floor, Bidding Room

Application documents are posted on the Hanno City official website.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/sogoseisakubu/shisankeieika/7334.html
summary: ℹ️ Sale of city-owned land (general competitive bidding)
